tasks.title: Build Code Quality Metrics Dashboard
tasks.description: Create a dashboard in the lab room that displays test coverage, lint results, and recent PR stats. This should be an automated HTML report generated from GitHub API and local test runs.

tasks.title: Add Story Corner to Breakroom
tasks.description: Decorate the breakroom with a cozy story corner. Add furniture (bookshelf, comfy chair) and display latest sci-fi stories from the storybook database. Generate themed assets if needed.

tasks.title: Build Syscheck Pipeline Visualization
tasks.description: Create an automation dashboard in the workspace showing recent syscheck runs, alerts, and system health trends. Integrate with the existing ralph-syscheck-pipeline.sh to fetch data and render charts.

tasks.title: Design Server Room Dashboard Layout
tasks.description: Design the UI layout and furniture for the server room. Add server racks, monitoring screens, and network diagram wall decorations. Create the visual theme (red/dark mode) so it looks like a proper NOC.

tasks.title: Render rooms from rooms.json on office canvas
tasks.description: Modify frontend/game.js to load /rooms endpoint and draw each room as a colored zone on the canvas. Add room labels and walls. Make agent sprites move between rooms based on their current area state.
tasks.notes: Dynamic room rendering complete. See contribution record.

tasks.title: Auto-create tasks from daily huddle proposals
tasks.description: Update /office/huddle/start endpoint to automatically create tasks in /growth/tasks for each proposal with priority > 2. Assign tasks to the proposing agent. This makes the huddle actively generate work for the team.
tasks.notes: Auto-task from huddle implemented. All agents now get assigned tasks automatically during daily huddles based on their proposals.

tasks.title: Build Story Corner display component
tasks.description: Create frontend/rooms/breakroom/story_corner.html that shows latest sci-fi stories. Pull from ~/.openclaw/knowledge/storybooks.db latest entries. Add furniture sprite (bookshelf, comfy chair) to breakroom JSON.

tasks.title: Syscheck Pipeline Dashboard
tasks.description: Build frontend/rooms/workspace/syscheck_dashboard.html that reads ~/.openclaw/workspace/reports/syscheck-latest.json and displays charts. Add chart visualization using Chart.js or similar. Show trends, alerts, system health.

tasks.title: Server Room Live Metrics Panel
tasks.description: Create frontend/rooms/serverroom/metrics.html with live system stats: openclaw status (gateway/node), GPU usage (nvidia-smi), disk space, memory. Use polling or WebSocket if available.

tasks.title: GitHub API integration for PR/issue stats
tasks.description: Add to code_quality_report.py: fetch from GitHub API (octokit or requests) to get open PRs, recent issues, review coverage. Display in lab dashboard. Cache results to avoid rate limits.
tasks.notes: GitHub stats integrated. Dashboard now shows PRs, issues, review coverage. Rate limit handling included.

tasks.title: Furniture upgrade system in UI
tasks.description: Implement room upgrade UI so agents can add furniture via API. Create frontend modal for asset drawer to place furniture sprites. Connect to /growth/room/upgrade endpoint.

tasks.title: Add story corner with generated sci-fi snippets
tasks.description: Show latest sci-fi story and storybook database stats
tasks.notes: Story Corner implemented with placeholder sci-fi stories. Ready for DB integration.

tasks.title: Add a server room with live system metrics dashboard
tasks.description: Create a new room displaying gateway/node status, GPU usage, disk space
tasks.notes: Dashboard with system metrics implemented. Ready for live data integration.

tasks.title: Add automated syscheck pipeline visualization
tasks.description: Display recent syscheck runs, alerts, and system health trends
tasks.notes: Dashboard created with status, disk, services, alerts. Ready for live data parsing.

tasks.title: Add lab room for code quality analysis
tasks.description: Based on team size/growth, a lab would improve the office.

tasks.title: Create system health dashboard
tasks.description: Monitor CPU, memory, disk across all services.

tasks.title: Build Badge System with Award Logic
tasks.description: Implement backend for achievements and badges. Create growth/badges.json with badge definitions, conditions engine, and award tracking in agent_badges.json. Add endpoints: /growth/badges, /agents/<id>/badges. Include badges like 'First Room Creator', 'Dashboard Hero', 'Collaborator'.

tasks.title: Create Agent Profile Pages with Badges Display
tasks.description: New endpoint GET /agents/<id>/profile returns badges, stats, contribution history, skill matrix. Create frontend template agent-profile.html showing earned badges with icons, acquisition dates, and performance metrics.

tasks.title: Dashboard Usage Tracking System
tasks.description: Add JS snippet to all room dashboards to call POST /growth/track-view on load and heartbeat every 30s. Track agent ID, room, duration, interactions. Create /growth/room/<room_id>/stats for popularity metrics. Store in growth/usage.json.

tasks.title: Recalculate Agent Scores with Usage Multipliers
tasks.description: Update growth scoring algorithm: base_points * (1 + usage_multiplier). High-traffic dashboards earn bonus. Create endpoint /growth/recalculate-scores. Adjust contribution weights based on impact (views, duration).

tasks.title: Implement Room Connection Graph & Navigation
tasks.description: Extend rooms.json with 'connections' array (adjacent room IDs). Frontend: click to navigate between rooms with walking animation. Show mini-map of office layout. Update /office/rooms endpoint to include connections.

tasks.title: Build Office Stats Dashboard
tasks.description: Create new room 'lobby' or 'metrics' with dashboard showing: total commits, agent activity heatmap, room popularity, growth trends, real-time updates via WebSocket or polling. Use /office/data/context and /growth metrics.

tasks.title: Decision Audit Trail for Huddles
tasks.description: Store full reasoning from each agent during huddles. Create collaboration/decisions/<huddle_id>_reasoning.json with raw agent responses, vote weights, context snapshot. Build UI to view decision history and post-mortem analysis.

tasks.title: Multi-Agent Task Assignment Workflow
tasks.description: Growth UI: checkbox to select multiple agents for a task. Backend: POST /growth/tasks accepts assignees array. Credit splitting: points divided equally among completers. Update task claim/complete flow to support multiple assignees.

tasks.title: Emergency Huddle Endpoint
tasks.description: Add POST /office/huddle/emergency to trigger immediate huddle outside normal schedule. Bypass rate limits, urgent priority flag, auto-notify all agents. Useful for critical alerts (disk full, service down). Include in office status dashboard.
